data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Stock Market Skids On Surging Oil Prices, Pare Losses As Broadcom, Nvidia Rise
data.description: As of the latest update, both the Dow Jones and Russell 2000 indices continue to slide amidst a significant rise in crude oil prices, reaching their highest level since July 2024. The current state of the market shows a clear impact of the surge in oil prices. Despite the overall decline, there have been some notable exceptions with stocks like Broadcom and Nvidia showing promising upward trends, helping to mitigate losses in the market. This report highlights the volatile nature of the market at present, with the energy sector's performance notably influencing the overall trajectory.

Company announces Q4 and full year 2025 operating and financial performance.

data.title: UPDATE – OptimizeRx Reports Strong Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: On March 5, 2026, based in Waltham, Massachusetts, OptimizeRx Corp. (Nasdaq: OPRX), a prominent healthcare technology solutions provider aiding life sciences firms in connecting with healthcare professionals (HCPs) and patients, revealed its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2025.

data.title: Canoe EIT Income Fund Announces March 2026 Monthly Distribution
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, on March 05, 2026, Canoe EIT Income Fund (TSX: EIT.UN) disclosed a monthly distribution for March 2026, set at $0.10 per unit. Shareholders recorded on March 20, 2026, are eligible to receive the distributions, scheduled for payment on April 15, 2026.

data.title: Costco Tops Views. These Retailers Retreat On Results; One Surges.
data.description: Costco's stock price dropped below the entry point following its earnings report on Thursday. Meanwhile, Victoria's Secret and BJ's both experienced significant decreases in their stock values. In contrast, Burlington's stock cleared the buy zone. Costco exceeded expectations in their latest financial report. The overall trend in the retail sector saw a downturn for some companies and a surge for others.

data.title: Cheniere Energy, Already Strong, Gets Added Boost From Gas Shortage
data.description: Cheniere Energy has displayed increasing price performance, leading to an upgrade in its IBD Relative Strength Rating. The company's strong performance has been further boosted by a gas shortage, propelling its already impressive standing.
U.S. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth holds a news conference at U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM).

data.title: Rare Element Resources Announces Results of Oversubscribed Rights Offering of Common Shares
data.description: In FIRESTONE, Colorado, Rare Element Resources Ltd. (RER) has announced that its recent rights offering for common shares exceeded expectations, bringing in around US$30.9 million in total. The offering, which closed on March 4, 2026, saw an oversubscription from investors. As a result, the additional shares will be distributed proportionally among shareholders who exercised their oversubscription privileges as per the allocation process.

data.title: DPL LLC Announces Launch of Consent Solicitation for its 4.35% Senior Notes due 2029
data.description: On March 5, 2026, in Dayton, Ohio, DPL LLC, formerly known as DPL Inc., revealed the beginning of a consent solicitation to modify the indenture governing its existing debt. This move aims to seek approval from investors to make amendments to the agreement. The company initiated this process to address certain clauses in the indenture ahead of a specified date.

data.title: AES Announces Launch of Consent Solicitation for Senior Notes
data.description: A press release on March 5, 2026, announced that The AES Corporation (NYSE: AES) has started consent solicitations to modify its indentures. The company is seeking approval from its stakeholders regarding these changes. The AES Corporation, based in Arlington, Virginia, is seeking to make alterations to its agreements through these consent solicitations.

data.title: Methanex releases Q4 2025 financial report.
data.description: A recent report indicates that the global unemployment rate has reached 6.5%, with approximately 187 million people currently unemployed worldwide. The study also highlights that youth unemployment remains a major concern, with 13.6% of individuals aged 15-24 without a job. Consequently, policymakers are facing increasing pressure to develop strategies to address this issue and create more opportunities for job seekers. Additionally, the report suggests that the current economic situation may further exacerbate the unemployment crisis in various regions.

data.title: Trigon Metals Announces Results of Annual General and Special Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: In Toronto, Trigon Metals Inc. (TSX-V: TM, OTCPK: PNTZF) disclosed the outcomes of its Annual General and Special Meeting of Shareholders. All proposals presented were endorsed by the shareholders. A notable decision was the approval for a name change to Safi Silver Corp., highlighting the company's shift towards polymetallic silver exploration projects.

data.title: IPALCO Enterprises, Inc. Announces Launch of Consent Solicitation for Senior Notes
data.description: On March 5, 2026, IPALCO Enterprises, Inc. began conducting consent solicitations to modify various indentures. These solicitations aim to amend the terms of the indentures. The company is seeking consent from all bondholders involved. The specific details of the proposed amendments are outlined in the solicitations. This move represents an important step for IPALCO in restructuring its financial obligations. The company encourages all relevant parties to participate in this process.
